content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”60px” el_class=”heig50″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”10630″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” css_animation=”none”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”12459″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” css_animation=”none”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-title”]

Our Story

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-content”]Established in 1968, ATW Travels is entirely owned and managed by Sangam Group of Hotels. The Sangam Group is recognized as one of the largest hotel chains in Tamil Nadu. Along with the Group, the ATW Travels is striving hard for ultimate success and innovation.

We are an ISO 9001: 2008 certified company that aim to set clear goals, fix the priorities and organize the resources effectively. ATW Travels enables you to discover a new destination and offer unique ideas to your travel.

Our travel company offers a complete business travel environment for MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences and Events) services at affordable cost. We provide a wide range of holiday tour packages for all the domestic and international destinations across the world.[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height=”30px” el_class=”hidediv”][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-title”]

Our Mission

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-content”]ATW Travels is a full integrated travel company that offers comprehensive solutions for all the business and leisure travelers across the world. This prestigious travel company in India mainly aims to satisfy the client’s requirements with ultimate transparency and cost-effectiveness. We assure to offer round the clock support and assistance at any point of your travel.[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height=”30px” el_class=”hidediv”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-title”]

Our Vision

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-content”]Our GT Team is striving hard to become the world class travel company and industry leader in the near future. We are planning to focus on customer centric approach and gain recognition among the worldwide clients. The travel company believes in maintaining highest quality standards and craft extraordinary moments especially for you.[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height=”30px” el_class=”hidediv”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”20px” el_class=”hidediv”]

1000+

Partners

We, ATW Travels strongly preserve transparency and our actions always go together. All the policies and tour packages are framed as per the legal law.

2k+

Properties

We focus on the main objectives and implement effective steps to accomplish on time. Our entire team analyses the results and aim for higher objectives.

300k+

Destinations

Customers play an important role for us. We understand the requirements of each of our customers and offer packages suiting to their budget and need.

40k+

Booking

The travel company in India keeps looking for new ideas and techniques to satisfy their customers. We would also request our clients and customers to suggest for new ideas when needed.

[vc_empty_space height=”65px” el_class=”hidediv”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement=”middle” el_id=”about-us-flex-section”][vc_column width=”1/4″][vc_single_image image=”12708″ img_size=”full”][vc_column_text]

Karthik M Manikandan
Founder & CEO

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″][vc_column_text el_class=”st-aboutus-content”]

CEO’s Note

“ATW Travels was instituted on strong conviction and strategic vision. Powered by a dedicated team of professionals and headed by visionary leaders, our highly devoted workforce has built the company brick by brick. The repute which the ATW Travels enjoys today is built upon loyal and unstinting customer support, painstakingly nurtured through the years. ATW Travels has, over the years, established a formidable presence in Tamil Nadu and emerged as South India’s No.1 travel company.”[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” row_fullwidth=”yes”][vc_column css=”.vc_custom_1543386510262{padding-right: 0px !important;padding-left: 0px !important;}”][vc_empty_space el_class=”hidediv”]

The Most Vibrant Travel Team in South India

Join Us
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”about_team_layer”][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”130px” el_class=”heig100″]
